name: @baseout/shared
description: Shared runtime utilities consumed by every Baseout app: AES-256-GCM encryption, HMAC service-token issuer/validator, structured error types, logging helpers, common Zod helpers.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/encryption.ts src/hmac.ts src/errors.ts src/logging.ts --format esm --dts --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/encryption.ts src/hmac.ts src/errors.ts src/logging.ts --format esm --dts --watch
